title: Lively Vanila
description: Attempts to make minecraft just a bit more lively with new animations and Vfx
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0aea90fe3c9b9114de935663e6c5f0c9acf32c2d.png)
# Aims to enhance minecraft with new animation, particles and more

Key features: New first and third person animations, Beautiful visual without shaders, new mob animation, new item and mob models for a few mobs and items, New emersiv particles and effects, QOl updates and more.


To see the mod list, you go to the versions page and click on a version and then scroll all the way down.
I will not be making the mod pack fore versions under 1.21.5

This is my first project on modrinth so don't expect to get a lot of updates.
